title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI to accelerate software delivery, with teams deploying daily and completing a large Java infrastructure upgrade six times faster. PayPal projects delivering 40% more capabilities in 2026 through AI adoption.
